title: A drama performance
description: For each question, write the correct answer. Write one word for each gap.

content.text: Our drama club performed a short play in front of the school last week. I had a small part, but I was still nervous (27) going on stage. We had practised for several weeks, and our teacher reminded us to speak clearly and slowly. The play was about a group of friends who get lost during a camping trip. At first, the audience was very quiet, but later they started laughing (28) the funny scenes. One actor forgot a line, although another student helped him continue without stopping. The performance went much better (29) we had expected. After the show, our teacher thanked everyone (30) working so hard. My parents said they were proud (31) me, which made me feel happy. I would like to take part in another performance (32) year.
